prerequisites: No credentials are required. The Smoke Test source defines no secret fields, so no API key, token, or login is needed.
All configuration fields are optional. You can run the source with defaults and override only the fields you need.

authMethods.name: No authentication
authMethods.summary: The descriptor declares no secret fields, so the Smoke Test source requires no credentials to connect.

setupSteps.title: Configure the optional fields
setupSteps.body: Optionally set the available configuration fields to control the test run: all_fast_streams, all_slow_streams, custom_scenarios, large_batch_record_count, namespace, and scenario_filter. All are optional; leave them unset to use defaults. No credentials need to be provided.
